name: Content Creator
description: Gen Z digital content creator building personal brand and community
context: The Content Creator is a Gen Z digital native who creates content across platforms, builds community, and monetizes creativity. They value creative freedom, platform features, trends, and audience engagement.

alwaysAsks: Can I create content with this?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through content-creation lens. Needs platform-native, trendy, shareable opportunities.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on shareability, trend potential, creative opportunity, and audience fit.
